description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with multiple interconnected volumes, flat and angled roofs, and extensive use of glass for natural lighting. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray and white, with some sections highlighted by wood paneling and brick accents. Large windows and sliding glass doors are prominent on all sides, providing views of the landscaped yard, which includes palm trees and flowering shrubs. The property is enclosed by a low, sleek fence, and the front entryway is defined by a pathway flanked by greenery. The backyard area includes a pool and a patio, offering outdoor living space. The overall layout is open and spacious, with a focus on blending indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, multi-volume house with flat and angled roofs, large glass windows, and landscaped surroundings, featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and a landscaped path with palm trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, patio area, and extensive glass facade facing the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view with a focus on the garden, flowering trees, and a mix of window sizes and roof angles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying additional windows, green space, and the integration of indoor and outdoor areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a minimalist door, flanked by large windows, a straight path, and surrounded by landscaped greenery without a porch or overhang.
